payload.task: ADD_TO_SPEC: Default model must be deepseek-reasoner, not deepseek-chat.
payload.spec_update:
## NFR: Default LLM Model for Agents

### Requirement
The default model for all agents (agent_1, agent_2, orchestrator) in
newly initialized projects MUST be `deepseek/deepseek-reasoner`.
Previously it was `deepseek/deepseek-chat`, which is less capable
for specification engineering tasks.

### Reason
- deepseek-reasoner has been tested and proven effective for agent work
- It provides better reasoning for spec analysis and code generation
- All current production deployments use deepseek-reasoner

### Implementation
- File: src/cli/commands_init.py
- Function: _create_default_agents_config()
- Changed: all three AgentConfig instances from "deepseek-chat" to "deepseek-reasoner"
- Provider remains "deepseek"
- Orchestrator temperature remains 0.3 (lower = more deterministic)
payload.title: NFR: Default LLM Model — deepseek-reasoner for All Agents
